Preface

"One fine day, you had an argument with your friends. You were required to go to the old abandoned factory alone. This place was considered cursed in the city, and also dangerous. There were rumors of ghosts of suicides and dead drug addicts. But you weren't a shy girl.."

"And so, armed with a phone camera, you headed into the depths of the abandoned place. You didn't notice anything unusual, only old non-working machines and broken furniture."

"Suddenly, your heart skipped a beat....you heard someone's voice..."

More bots....
